title: Builder'sTrowels
description: Builder’s Trowels adds multiple trowel tiers that place random blocks from your hotbar with varying speeds. Perfect for creative building, terrain detailing, and natural paths - now with optional blacklist support for excluded items.
body:
# 🧱 Builder’sTrowels - Mod

Build with style, speed, and a touch of randomness.

Builder’s Trowels adds a collection of craftable trowels, each with its own placing speed and material tier - allowing you to place random blocks from your hotbar with a single right-click.
![builder'strowels-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da63ab145c88270b130fdceaf679e5e14516d876_0.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ui4CaIn0D5o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Whether you’re shaping natural paths, creating ruins, or decorating terrain, these trowels make building faster, more fun, and a little unpredictable.

## ⚒️ Features:

- 🧰 Multiple Trowel Tiers - Each material type offers a unique placing speed and durability.
  - Copper Trowel - Slow and steady.
  - Iron Trowel - Standard placing speed.
  - Golden Trowel - Extremely fast, but fragile.
  - Diamond Trowel - Faster than iron and lasts longer.
  - Netherite Trowel - The ultimate tool for rapid builders.
- 🎲 Randomized Block Placement. Places a random block from your hotbar, perfect for mixing textures and creating natural variety.
- 🚫 Blacklist System. Some tiers support a customizable blacklist to exclude certain blocks or items from random placement.

## 🌿 Designed for Creative Builders

Bring a handcrafted, organic look to your builds without manually swapping blocks.
Ideal for paths, walls, ruins, terrain detailing, and everything in between.

## 🧩 Compatibility

- ✅ Works out of the box with most modded blocks.
- ⚙️ Fully configurable through blacklist settings
- 🔨 Lightweight and easy to integrate into any modpack.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
